chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – Discipline of the charity (Zakāt) collector

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/73)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/73)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ أَ يَجْمَعُ النَّاسَ الْمُصَدِّقُ أَمْ يَأْتِيهِمْ عَلَى مَنَاهِلِهِمْ

text: لَا بَلْ يَأْتِيهِمْ عَلَى مَنَاهِلِهِمْ فَيُصَدِّقُهُمْ .

en.hubeali: Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having been asked, ‘Should the Zakāt collector gather the people or should he go to them to their watering places?’ Heasws said: ‘No, but he should go to them to their watering places, so he would collect their charity (Zakāt)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Hammad ibn ‘Isa has narrated from Hariz from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked, ‘Does Zakat collector call people in one place or he comes to where people are? He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he comes to their places and collects their charity (Zakat).’”
